clusters.topic: Nvidia Stock May Be Oversold - What is the Best NVDA Play?
clusters.summary: Nvidia, Inc. generated a massive 124% YoY growth in free cash flow (FCF) in Q4 and 59% in 2025. Its FCF margins were over 51% of sales in Q4 and 44.7% in 2025. If that persists, NVDA stock could be worth at least 45% more.
